---
title: "Holly (Ilex aquifolium)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Aquifoliaceae](/trees/family/aquifoliaceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Ilex*](/trees/genus/ilex.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 136 — Holly](../136.html) |  |
| [Tree 137 — Holly](../137.html) |  |
| [Tree 138 — Holly](../138.html) |  |
| [Tree 185 — Holly](../185.html) |  |
| [Tree 310 — Holly](../310.html) |  |
| [Tree 315 — Holly](../315.html) |  |
| [Tree 349 — Holly](../349.html) |  |
| [Tree 373 — Holly](../373.html) |  |
| [Tree 387 — Holly](../387.html) |  |
